{{Quote|You just run, Elrod. You'll be safe. I'll come back for you…|Elrod's owner|<ref name="Hide in Plain Sight">{{CWACite|2|Hide in Plain Sight}}</ref>}}
This '''[[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]]''' owned an [[eopi]] named [[Elrod]] and lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nadiem/Legends|Nadiem]].

Prior to the [[Battle of Nadiem]], [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|forces]] evacuated Elrod's owner from his town. Despite his wishes, the man was forced to leave his eopi behind, as it would have taken the space of three people on the [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|evacuation ships]].
